description: The ``Boolean Counter`` node takes in a list of booleans and counts the number of true and false values, as well as a count of all booleans in the list.

fields.Booleans: The list of booleans to be counted.
fields.TrueCount: The true count of all booleans in the list.
fields.FalseCount: The false count of all booleans in the list.
fields.TotalCount: The total count of booleans in this list.
